texto: Good writing should help us see the world in new ways, it should crack open our generosity towards each other. That's what I hope my work does anyway. I want someone to read it and know that they aren't alone in the universe. I want my words to act as connective tissue.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Patrick Hicks sobre temas ligados a trabalho. A afirmação “Good writing should help us see the world in new ways, it should crack open our generosity toward…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a trabalho, fiction, writing, útil em momentos de trabalho e writing.

frase_original: Good writing should help us see the world in new ways, it should crack open our generosity towards each other. That's what I hope my work does anyway. I want someone to read it and know that they aren't alone in the universe. I want my words to act as connective tissue.
